Home / Services / Stucco Repair

Stucco Repair

Protect your home's exterior with our professional stucco repair services.

Stucco is a common exterior finish in Phoenix, but it's susceptible to cracking and damage from the intense sun and monsoon rains. Mountain View Painters offers expert stucco repair services to keep your home looking its best. We start by carefully inspecting your stucco for cracks, holes, and other imperfections. We then use high-quality patching materials to repair the damaged areas. We match the texture and color of your existing stucco to ensure a seamless repair. Our skilled technicians are experienced in all types of stucco repair, from small cracks to large holes. We understand the importance of proper preparation, and we take the time to thoroughly clean and prepare the surface before applying any patching materials. We also offer stucco sealing services to protect your stucco from moisture damage. Our goal is to provide long-lasting repairs that blend seamlessly with your existing stucco. Regular stucco maintenance is essential for preventing further damage and extending the lifespan of your home's exterior. Trust Mountain View Painters to keep your stucco looking its best.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Thoroughly inspect stucco for damage.
  2. 02 Step 2: Clean and prepare the damaged areas.
  3. 03 Step 3: Apply high-quality patching materials.
  4. 04 Step 4: Match texture and color for a seamless repair.

Benefits

  • Prevents further damage
  • Maintains curb appeal
  • Increases home value
  • Extends lifespan of stucco

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I have my stucco inspected?

We recommend having your stucco inspected annually to identify and address any potential problems early on.

Can you repair large holes in stucco?

Yes, we are experienced in repairing all types of stucco damage, including large holes.

Do you offer stucco sealing services?

Yes, we offer stucco sealing services to protect your stucco from moisture damage.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with stucco repair? Contact us today.
